title: Bowel polyps - NHS
text:
to develop bowel polyps if:
a member of your family has had bowel polyps or bowel cancer you're over 50 (around 1 in 4 people over 50 will have at least 1 polyp) you have inflammatory bowel disease, which includes ulcerative colitis or Crohn's disease you're overweight or smoke 
Page last reviewed: 28 July 2023
Next review due: 28 July 2026
